entries.title: Compound Engineering: engineering + estimation feedback loops (epic)
Headless session.context emission for claude --bg phase agents
Move ticket-compound from catalyst-foundry to catalyst-dev (core plugin)
Shared incremental-event-counter primitive
reaper-metrics: counters-not-rows (bound the 168k-event memory leak + per-tick scan)
fix(dev): reclaim jobLifecycle-alive-but-FRESH-agents-absent ghost workers (CC 2.x state.json never flips terminal)
Periodic liveness refresh: keep the snapshot warm so idle tick cadence doesn't hold dispatch on the staleMs gate (CTL-790 follow-up)
Reaper worktree-safety: require positive done-evidence, never --force, protect interactive/unknown worktrees, flag instead of delete
Fix CTL-731 liveness deadline race: setImmediate-deferred verdict + child.exitCode check
Triage-entry dispatch storm: make triage the scheduler entry phase + graceful predecessor kick-back
Remove Conductor (CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE_PATH) references — Catalyst owns its worktree location
Plugin reorg: catalyst-foundry plugin + legacy topology fix + compound-estimate rename
execution-core: batch per-ticket Linear reads into one filtered query per tick
Event-sourced phase-lifecycle reactor: workers emit+exit, daemon derives signal-flip/advance/stop (fixes zombie + orphan deadlock)
